violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observe 2 employees applying gloves without washing hands.

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. Chicken strips, chicken in warmer had temperature of 124-125 F. Manager turned hot hold temperature to higher temperature. Temperature still did not get warm enough to hold food at 140 F or greater.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed food warmer not cleaned as frequent as needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed build up of debris on floors and under equipment.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Ice maker chute needs cleaning.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not placed in a self-draining position. Mops were not put in self draining position.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
